zh.lifeSummary: Thomas Darell是Geoffrey Darell的兒子，於大約1117年出生在英國越可爾惠爾德拉可。他於1142年與Sarah Wyndham在英國越可爾惠爾德拉可結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1176年在英國越可爾約克享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Thomas Darell是Geoffrey Darell的儿子，于大约1117年出生在英国越可爾惠爾德拉可。他于1142年与Sarah Wyndham在英国越可爾惠爾德拉可结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1176年在英国越可爾約克享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Darell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: Thomas Darell was born about 1117, in Wheldrake, Yorkshire, England as the son of Geoffrey Darell. He married Sarah Wyndham in 1142, in Wheldrake, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1176, in York, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Thomas Darell est né environ 1117, à Wheldrake, Everwyck, Angleterre, fils de Geoffrey Darell. Il a épousé Sarah Wyndham en 1142, à Wheldrake, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1176, à York, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Thomas Darell wurde um 1117 in Wheldrake, Yorkshire, England, als Sohn von Geoffrey Darell geboren. Er hat 1142 in Wheldrake, Yorkshire, England Sarah Wyndham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1176 im Alter von 60 Jahren in York, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Thomas Darell è nato il circa 1117 nel Wheldrake, Yorkshire, England come figlio di Geoffrey Darell. Lui sposato Sarah Wyndham nel 1142, nel Wheldrake, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1176, nel York, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Darellは約1117年にイギリスヨークシュアイアウエルドラクでGeoffrey Darellの息子として生まれた。1142年にイギリスヨークシュアイアウエルドラクでSarah Wyndhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1176年にイギリスヨークシュアイアヨークで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Darell(은)는 대략 1117년 영국 요르크실르 화드라크에서 Geoffrey Darell의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1142년 영국 요르크실르 화드라크에서 Sarah Wyndham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1176년 영국 요르크실르 요르크에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Thomas Darell nasceu aproximadamente 1117, em Wheldrake, Yorkshire, Inglaterra filho de Geoffrey Darell. Ele casou-se com Sarah Wyndham em 1142, em Wheldrake, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1176, em York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Thomas Darell родился около 1117 г. в местности уелдрек, еркшир, Англия. Его отца звали Geoffrey Darell. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah Wyndham в 1142 г. в местности уелдрек, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1176 г. в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Thomas Darell nació aproximadamente 1117, en Wheldrake, Yorkshire, Inglaterra como hijo de Geoffrey Darell. Se casó con Sarah Wyndham en 1142, en Wheldrake, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1176, en York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 60 años.
